Package control

package control
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AlertManager
    Monitors budget thresholds and sends notifications when spending milestones are reached.
    AuthManager
    Manages PIN-based authentication and lockout logic for the application.
    CycleManager
    Handles the lifecycle of a BudgetCycle: creation, retrieval, status updates, and deletion.
    ExpenseManager
    Coordinates expense and category operations, delegating persistence to DatabaseHelper and triggering budget alerts via AlertManager.
    LimitCalculator
    Calculates daily spending limits based on the remaining balance and remaining days in the active BudgetCycle.
